text:
Some say that cats own the world. Certainly there was never a cat I didn’t adore.

Poor Whiskers. Whiskers never slept. You think they hate you? You’d think that would wear them down. Oh. Oh no. Just Whiskers.

He’d sit outside your window. You try to sleep. You want a nap. Oh no.

Just listen.

You’d sleep, and you’d dream.

You would have a nice long sleep.

You’d wake up.

You’d go outside.

And you would listen.

Oh yes.

Those silly little whiskers.

You’d love them.

You’d cuddle them.

They’d sleep.

You’d snore.

They’d howl.

They’d chase you.

They wouldn’t forgive that. Ever.

You’d take them inside.

You’d talk.

You wouldn’t leave them.

You’re crazy.

Well they’d live forever.

Oh no.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
